*Pattern Generation Logic*
This C++ solution constructs a fractal-like grid using nested loops and modular arithmetic to create visual complexity. The code avoids simple linear sequences by applying recursive depth and dynamic spacing.

*Mathematical Sequence Integration*
Numbers are embedded within the pattern using a Fibonacci variant, ensuring each cell value depends on its predecessors. This approach demands careful memory management and precise index calculations to prevent overflow errors.

*Code Implementation Details*
The program utilizes modern C++ features like range-based loops and lambda functions for concise yet powerful logic. It demonstrates advanced control flow and efficient resource usage without external libraries.
